mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, reason, status, approver_id, created_at, updated_at FROM leave_request ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, reason, status, approver_id, created_at, updated_at FROM leave_request WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, reason, status, approver_id, created_at, updated_at FROM leave_request WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request (employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, reason) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reason})
